title: C03's Improved Tridents
description: I updated the tridents to look more in line with modern Minecraft art, the design that fits with the current style of the game and create mod!
body:
The Modern Minecraft Trident

The design of this trident texture was refined to align with Mojang's modern art style, which prioritizes clean lines, subtle shading, and a greater sense of depth while preserving the iconic blocky aesthetic.

Furthermore, the material of the trident was specifically chosen to be bronze, ensuring it integrates seamlessly with themes of the Create mod. This makes the trident feel like an authentic feel within a Create-based world.
